query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `trading_conversations` (
  `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` INT NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '未命名对话',
  `content` LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  `tags` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `conversationDate` DATE DEFAULT NULL,
  `source` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '对话来源，如 ChatGPT、Claude、DeepSeek 等',
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_userId` (`userId`),
  INDEX `idx_conversationDate` (`conversationDate`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `trading_conversations` (
  `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` INT NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '未命名对话',
  `content` LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  `tags` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `conversationDate` DATE DEFAULT NULL,
  `source` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '对话来源，如 ChatGPT、Claude、DeepSeek 等',
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_userId` (`userId`),
  INDEX `idx_conversationDate` (`conversationDate`)
);
